summary: CRITICAL FAILURE: ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 is missing entirely. Workflow references it at line 33 ('Invoke-Pester ./ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1') but file doesn't exist—workflow will crash. TDD requirement ('write failing test FIRST') unmet; no test file provided. Main script lacks Set-StrictMode; uses unconventional $MyInvocation check instead of module pattern. Hardcoded mock data in entry point (lines 114–121) defeats parameterized testing. Run-Tests.ps1 asserts on generic patterns rather than exact expected values per spec ('EXACT EXPECTED VALUES'). Dry-run/live-run jobs duplicate script calls. Incomplete, non-functional deliverable.
